JPAR Events.title: JPAR Connect - Tech Tuesday
JPAR Events.description: Join Courtney Schafer from Core Coaching For Real Estate for a weekly Lead Generating Challenge using your JPAR Connect CRM!
JPAR Events.info:
**Every Tuesday

**Join Courtney Schafer from Core Coaching For Real Estate for a weekly Lead Generating Challenge using your JPAR Connect CRM!

JPAR Events.title: VRN/Skillbridge Information Session
JPAR Events.description: Join us every Wednesday for an in-depth VRN/SkillBridge Information Session hosted by Manny Silva, CMSgt, USAF (Ret.), Director of the Veteran Realty Network. This weekly Zoom call gives JPAR agents a clear understanding of how the DoD SkillBridge Program works, how transitioning service members can train full-time with JPAR as their official duty location, and how the VRN is building a nationwide community of veteran REALTORS committed to leadership, mentorship, and mission-first service. Whether you're looking to support SkillBridge interns, join the VRN, or simply understand how veterans strengthen our culture and our industry, this session provides the guidance, structure, and opportunity to get involved.
JPAR Events.info:
For detailed, one-on-one advising,

book a direct call with Manny: https://calendly.com/manny-jpar/zoom-call-with-manny-silva

JPAR Events.title: Chill & Chat | Removing Financing Contingencies
JPAR Events.description: Join industry veteran, and everyone's favorite pal, Howard and special guests for casual conversations on topics that impact the real estate agent, the consumer and the real estate industry.
JPAR Events.info: The weekly series designed to keep REALTORS® like YOU informed, inspired, and ahead of the curve. Join Howard Ashkinos - real estate veteran, entrepreneur, and coach who has built a career on service, integrity, and leadership. Whether helping someone buy their first home, build a thriving real estate business, or step into their own purpose, he inspires others to pursue excellence and make a lasting impact.

JPAR Events.title: National Trends Update with Ironton Capital & JPAR
JPAR Events.description: Are you ready to weather the challenges and capitalize on the opportunities of the National Real Estate Trends in these volatile and uncertain markets? If you ever wanted to: Examine how this year’s fluctuating mortgage rates might impact your market during moving season. Analyze when the real estate prices are poised to drop. Forecast pricing trends in the apartment market
JPAR Events.info: Get ahead of the trends this summer based on hard numbers, not your gut!

JPAR Events.title: Global Listing Mastermind
JPAR Events.description: Join us for an interactive Listing Mastermind designed specifically for JPAR franchise agents to collaborate, exchange ideas, and share real-world strategies that are helping generate listings in today’s market.This small-group breakout session will give agents the opportunity to discuss what’s working right now —from prospecting and marketing to AI tools, listing presentations, follow-up systems, and sellerconversations.Ready to grow your listing business and gain fresh ideas from agents across the network? Join in on the conversation!
JPAR Events.info: This session is exclusive to Franchise owners and agents.

JPAR Events.title: Team Mastermind
JPAR Events.description: Our monthly Team Mastermind with Rick Davidson brings together team leads and agents interested in building successful teams through discussion, collaboration, and shared experience.
JPAR Events.info: This session is open to team leads and agents interested in starting or growing a team. Content may vary month to month based on discussion topics and participant questions. Apply today!

JPAR Events.title: Retire Early Passively: How to Get More Listings by Helping Clients Retire Early!
JPAR Events.description: What will it take to retire early passively? Possibly $3 Million less than trying to retire with active investing. Crazy, right?
JPAR Events.info: Come to the Retire Early Passively online workshop and we’ll work the numbers for you and your clients to see: How much annual income you will need to retire with the lifestyle you deserve. How much you will need in assets to provide the target income. How you can convert your active real estate investments to passive. How much you could increase your IRR to reduce the time it will take before you can retire. How to get more listings by helping people retire early…and more!

JPAR Events.title: 2026 JPAR Owner Summit - Momentum
JPAR Events.description: Join JPAR brokerage owners from across the country in Nashville for a high-impact leadership experience focused on growth, innovation, collaboration, and the future of real estate. The Owner Summit brings together top leaders for strategic conversations, networking, and actionable insights designed to elevate business performance and strengthen our community.
JPAR Events.info: Early bird ticket pricing ends June 15th, 2026!

JPAR TX Events.title: Broker Q&A (aka Ask the Broker)
JPAR TX Events.description: Get your questions answered! No holds barred!
JPAR TX Events.info:
Every Monday

Join in on the webinar and get your questions answered. But please turn on your camera and learn how to mute yourself unless you are talking. We want to see you and have some great conversations!

JPAR TX Events.title: Open Title Career Accelerator for Real Estate Agents
JPAR TX Events.description: Fast-track your success in real estate! Whether you’re newly licensed or looking to take your career to the next level, the Real Estate Career Accelerator Class is designed to give you the strategies, tools, and insider knowledge you need to thrive in today’s market.
JPAR TX Events.info: Led by industry experts with a proven track record, this class will cover: How to generate and convert high-quality leads. Mastering client relationships for long-term success. Building a winning brand and marketing strategy. Time management and goal-setting for peak performance. This is your opportunity to learn from the best, network with like-minded professionals, and gain actionable insights to grow your real estate business

JPAR TX Events.title: Tuesday Tune-Up
JPAR TX Events.description: Join me for a quick, casual Tuesday Tune-Up — a 30-minute check-in to get aligned for the rest of the week, talk through anything that came upset (or reset) your focus, and build a little momentum.
JPAR TX Events.info: No pressure. No prep. Just a standing space to plug in, regroup, and keep things moving.

JPAR TX Events.title: Monthly Training Series-Every 2nd Tuesday of Each Month Round Rock | Credit Deep Dive (EL PASO)
JPAR TX Events.description: Strategic Financing Masterclass Series is a monthly Zoom training designed to help JPAR agents better understand financing, overcome client objections, structure stronger deals, and create more solutions for buyers and sellers. Each session includes financing education, title insights, and live Q&A with industry experts.
JPAR TX Events.info: Whether you're a new agent or a seasoned pro, you'll walk away with actionable strategies to help your clients, serve your customers better, and grow your business

JPAR TX Events.title: 2nd Tuesday Monthly Training | CMG Home Loans & Open Title
JPAR TX Events.description: We’re kicking off a 2nd Tuesday Monthly Training with our friends at CMG Home Loans & Open Title — and this is one you’re actually going to want on your calendar.
JPAR TX Events.info: This is the kind of stuff that makes your conversations with clients smoother and your offers stronger.

EVERY WEDNESDAY

No pressure. No agenda. Just movement and connection.

JPAR TX Events.title: The Listing Lab - Listings not moving? Let’s change that.
JPAR TX Events.description: The Listing Lab is a hands-on session designed to help you break through the obstacles holding your listings back. Whether it’s pricing, positioning, marketing, or buyer perception, we’ll take a real look at what’s happening and more importantly, what to do next. Real feedback to help things move.
JPAR TX Events.info: No fluff. No theory. Just real solutions to get your listings moving.

JPAR TX Events.title: Coffee, Donuts, & Pop Bys with Julie
JPAR TX Events.description: Grab your coffee, pull up a chair, and come get stuff DONE. Pop in, meet Julie, and finally put a face to the name behind your smoothest closings. Good vibes, great coffee, and zero reason not to show up.
JPAR TX Events.info: Bring your laptop, get some work done, and take advantage of this dedicated time to finally put a face to the name behind your smoothest closings. It's a win-win.

JPAR TX Events.title: Navigating the New Contracts: Texas Contract Changes Effective July 1
JPAR TX Events.description: The July 1 contract updates go far beyond Listing and Buyer Representation Agreements — and agents who don’t understand the changes are putting themselves and their clients at unnecessary risk.
JPAR TX Events.info:
This broker-led training will cover the remaining Texas contract and forms updates taking effect July 1, including changes to disclosures, notices, compensation procedures, addenda, contract language, delivery requirements, and other key updates impacting Texas transactions. Our goal is simple: help agents understand what changed, how these changes affect day-to-day business, and how to avoid costly mistakes caused by outdated habits or incorrect form usage.This training is designed for Texas REALTORS® who want to stay informed, protected, and confident heading into the next phase of Texas real estate.


Join us via Zoom!

https://jpar.zoom.us/meeting/register/SOq60iNfTRuMf_eTsfeq2Q

JPAR TX Events.title: Social Media and Video Marketing Class
JPAR TX Events.description: Join DFW West Ambassador Abra Barker and Tom Tevis of Fairway Mortgage for a practical session designed specifically for real estate agents who want to grow their presence, build credibility, and stay top-of-mind with consumers.
JPAR TX Events.info: This class will show you how to create simple, authentic video content that positions you as the local expert without spending hours editing or trying to go viral.

JPAR TX Events.title: Closing Mastery Part 1: Title Commitments
JPAR TX Events.description: Title commitments can make or break a deal — do you know what to look for? Join us as we break down the ABCs of a title commitment — from Schedule A's basic transaction details, to the must-resolve requirements in Schedule B-1, to the exceptions and exclusions in Schedule B-2 that every agent needs to understand.
JPAR TX Events.info: We'll show you how to read it, what red flags to watch for, and what it all means for protecting your clients and keeping your deals on track. Come ready to learn. Your clients are counting on you.

JPAR TX Events.title: Navigating the New Contracts: Listing & Buyer Rep Changes Effective July 1
JPAR TX Events.description: Join us for a fun, hands-on class where we create thoughtful pop-by gifts for past clients that keep you top of mind and drive referrals. Because small gestures lead to big business.
JPAR TX Events.info:
This broker-led training is focused specifically on the new Listing Agreement and Buyer Representation Agreement updates taking effect July 1 and what Texas agents need to understand before using these forms in real-world transactions. We’ll break down the updated compensation language, agreement structure changes, representation expectations, and the conversations agents should be having with clients moving forward.


Join us via Zoom!

https://jpar.zoom.us/meeting/register/9qcnV-0TS5WTDWESrkdnqA#/registration

JPAR TX Events.title: From Busy to Clear: Why You Feel Overwhelmed (and What Actually Fixes It)

You’ll learn the core executive functioning skills that drive productivity, why things like time management and task completion feel harder than they should, and how to start creating clarity without adding more to your plate.
JPAR TX Events.info: If you’ve been craving a clearer way to operate (without adding more to your plate), this one is worth your time.

Digital Library.title: Broker Q&A

Digital Library.description: TNT: Tuesday Night Training is designed to help agents at every level level up their business, master their craft, and build lasting success.

Digital Library.title: Global Update: Company-Wide Launch of JPAR NOVA 2.0
Digital Library.description: The game is on! Join us for the official launch of NOVA 2.0 — JPAR’s next-generation agent operating platform and Learning Management System designed to help you grow your business.
Digital Library.info: Don’t miss this exciting company-wide launch as we unveil how NOVA can help simplify your workflow, sharpen your focus, and support your path toward greater production and success.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26 - From Chaos to Conversion: Building a Workflow That Actually Works
Digital Library.description: Most agents don’t fail from lack of effort—they fail from using the wrong tool at the wrong stage of the client journey. In this JPAR Thrive session, we’ll break down the real estate workflow from lead to close and identify exactly where BoldTrail tools should be activated for maximum impact.
Digital Library.info: You’ll learn how to align your actions with the correct systems—so you’re not overworking, duplicating effort, or missing opportunities.

Digital Library.title: Global Mastermind: Winning Strategies from Agents Who Are Doing the Business
Digital Library.description: Session 1: The Listing Playbook Winning Listings in Today's Market
Digital Library.info: Join three top-performing JPAR/Your Castle agents as they break down the strategies they use to consistently win listings, position homes effectively, and stand out with sellers in a competitive market.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26 - Stop Guessing. Start Flowing: The Right Tool at the Right Time in Your Workflow
Digital Library.description: Most agents don’t fail from lack of effort—they fail from using the wrong tool at the wrong stage of the client journey.
Digital Library.info: In this JPAR Thrive session, we’ll break down the real estate workflow from lead to close and identify exactly where BoldTrail tools should be activated for maximum impact.

Digital Library.title: Did you know JPAR agent's already have AI?
Digital Library.description: Many agents are searching for new AI tools while overlooking the powerful artificial intelligence already built into the JPAR technology ecosystem.
Digital Library.info: In this training, Courtney Schafer will walk agents through practical examples of how AI features within the JPAR Connect powered by BoldTrail platform can help automate follow-up, streamline communication, improve listing marketing, and increase lead conversion.

Digital Library.title: Thrive: Social Media Mastery - From Content to Closings
Digital Library.description: Consistency is what turns visibility into opportunity. In this second session of Social Media Mastery, we move from strategy to execution - showing you how to build a simple, repeatable system that keeps you visible, engaged, and converting attention into real business.
Digital Library.info: You’ll learn how to create content without burnout, leverage AI to stay consistent, and turn everyday engagement into meaningful conversations that lead to clients.

Digital Library.title: CubiCasa 103 Webinar & JPAR
Digital Library.description: Learn how to unlock the full potential of CubiCasa offered through your MLS subscription!
Digital Library.info: Join us for a 30-minute webinar to delve deeper into CubiCasa's features, including tutorials on editing floor plans, creating customized styles, and maximizing the value of purchased add-ons.

Digital Library.title: Thrive: Social Media Mastery - Foundation for Growth
Digital Library.description: Stop guessing what to post - and start showing up with purpose. In this first session of Social Media Mastery, we focus on building the foundation every successful agent needs: clarity, positioning, and a strategic approach to content.
Digital Library.info: You’ll learn how to shift from simply posting to intentionally building a brand that attracts the right clients.

Digital Library.title: Hurdlr for JPAR Agents
Digital Library.description: This session will cover the benefits of Hurdlr, how to access this JPAR benefit, and how to set up your account. We’ll walk through the mileage, finance, and tax-tracking features and demonstrate how to track these items on a per-buyer or per-listing basis.
Digital Library.info: Join us to learn how to maximize your JPAR Hurdlr benefit and simplify your business finances.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: Create a Referral-Based Business: Proven Strategies for Referral Lead Generation!
Digital Library.description: Timeless principals of building a referral-based business. The greatest authors principals stay timeless. Join us to get a fresh perspective on how to boost your business in 2026.
Digital Library.info: The session covers how realtors grow business through referrals by staying top of mind, being clear about who they help, and nurturing relationships instead of directly asking for referrals.

Digital Library.title: Smarter Money for Smarter Agents: Financial & Tax Strategies Every JPAR Agent Should Know
Digital Library.description: Success in real estate is not only about earning more. It is about managing timing, cash flow, and reserves so income volatility does not create financial stress.
Digital Library.info: Consistent tax saving, expense tracking, and quarterly planning can prevent surprises and can significantly reduce what agents ultimately owe.

Digital Library.title: CubiCasa 102 Webinar & JPAR
Digital Library.description: Learn how CubiCasa’s innovative products can enhance your property listings and presentations. This session will cover the benefits included in your MLS subscription and showcase both new and existing features designed to take your business to the next level.
Digital Library.info: Discover how our accurate, visually appealing floor plans can help you stand out in a competitive market.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: Create a Referral-Based Business: Proven Strategies for Referral Lead Generation!

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: AI in Action: Lead Nurture, Marketing, and Everyday Workflows
Digital Library.description: This session moves beyond the basics and into real-world application. Agents will learn how to use AI across marketing, lead nurture, and client communication.
Digital Library.info: You’ll see how to turn one idea into multiple pieces of content, personalize follow-up at scale, and build simple AI workflows that support your business every day.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: AI Foundations: Save Time, Stay Consistent, and Scale Smarter
Digital Library.description: In this Thrive session, agents will be introduced to AI in a practical, easy-to-use way that fits naturally into everyday real estate activities.
Digital Library.info: You’ll learn how to use AI as a productivity partner to save time, reduce burnout, and create consistent, high-quality communication—without losing your voice or crossing compliance lines.

Digital Library.title: CubiCasa 101 Webinar & JPAR
Digital Library.description: Learn more about CubiCasa, the go-to app used by thousands of real estate professionals every day to create floor plans in only 5 minutes.
Digital Library.info: Greatly improve your listings and listing presentations – FOR FREE! We’ll talk about the benefits of adding a floorplan to your listing media, and how the technology works.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: Increase Your Business with Non-QM lending
Digital Library.description: In this session, you’ll learn how to expand your toolbox with options like bank statement loans, 1099 loans, investor and cash-flow loans, and solutions for self-employed clients, freelancers, and contractors - so you never have to walk away from a motivated buyer again.

Digital Library.title: Protect What You’ve Built: AD&D & Life Insurance
Digital Library.description: Discover how JPAR’s AD&D and Life Insurance programs help protect you and your loved ones.
Digital Library.info: This session will cover the essentials of these benefits, show you how to view and update your coverage, and explain why assigning beneficiaries is crucial.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in ’26 Kickoff: Fundamental Planning
Digital Library.description: 2026 success doesn’t start in January - it starts with intentional planning. Kick off Thrive in ’26 with a powerful session designed to help you shift from simply producing more…to keeping more of what you make.
Digital Library.info: This event will challenge you to think like a business owner, not just a salesperson, by focusing on profit-first planning, real revenue, and smarter expense management.

Digital Library.title: Global Update: Tax Planning for 2026 – Entity Review – What can we do now session
Digital Library.description: Join us for an exclusive Global Update session featuring Matt Goldston and Emily Hegab as they dive into Tax Planning for 2026 – Entity Review: What Can We Do Now?, offering strategic insights to help you stay ahead in a shifting financial landscape.
Digital Library.info: Plus, don't miss Rick Davidson as he delivers a compelling Market Overview for 2025 and a forward-looking briefing on the NAR Strategic Plan Update.

Digital Library.title: Get to Know Your Free Avibra Benefits
Digital Library.description: Discover how to make the most of your free Avibra benefits in this informative webinar.
Digital Library.info: Learn how Avibra supports your financial well-being, family, and career resilience through tools like Work Lotto, Well-Being Advisor, and more — all at no cost to you.

Digital Library.title: Thrive in '26: Business Planning 2026 with special guest, David Knox!
Digital Library.description: Get ready to finish the year strong and step into 2026 with clarity and confidence! Nationally recognized speaker and trainer David Knox is bringing his proven approach to values-based business planning exclusively to JPAR agents.
Digital Library.info: This interactive session will help you define your goals, strengthen your mindset, and create actionable habits that set you up for long-term success.

Digital Library.title: TNT: Tuesday Night Training
Digital Library.description: TNT: Tuesday Night Training is designed to help agents at every level level up their business, master their craft, and build lasting success.

Digital Library.description: Join nationally known speaker Steve Black for a power-packed session on real estate success in 2025 and beyond.
Digital Library.info: Learn to save time with AI tools, master buyer and seller scripts for today’s market, and use social media to attract referrals and build a standout personal brand.

Digital Library.title: JPAR Always Inspiring - Your Ultimate Listing Pipeline
Digital Library.description: Join Matthew Ferrara, who will demonstrate two small shifts you can make in your sales strategy to create sustainable success for your career.

Digital Library.description: Join Tony Delgado for an in-depth webinar on SB 140, the newly passed legislation that brings important changes to the real estate industry.
Digital Library.info: This session will break down the key provisions of the bill, discuss its impact on agents, brokers, and clients, and outline practical steps you can take to stay compliant and ahead of the curve.

Digital Library.title: Financial Wellness for Real Estate Agents: Building Stability in an Unpredictable Market
Digital Library.description: Join us for a powerful webinar designed to help real estate agents achieve financial stability in a commission-based career.
Digital Library.info: We’ll cover smart budgeting for fluctuating income, building savings and emergency funds, managing expenses and debt, leveraging commission advances, and planning for long-term wealth through investing and retirement strategies.

Digital Library.title: Pathway to Luxury Real Estate
Digital Library.description: Join us for this high-impact training designed to equip real estate professionals with the knowledge, tools, and strategy to serve high-net-worth clients and build a thriving luxury business.
Digital Library.info: You’ll get expert insights on identifying luxury clients, developing relationships that convert, and positioning yourself as a trusted advisor in the high-end space.

Digital Library.title: Mastering Time Management for a Purpose-Driven Real Estate Career
Digital Library.description: Success in real estate doesn’t just happen—it’s built through intentional actions and smart use of time. This training helps agents identify how to structure their days around high-impact activities, eliminate distractions, and stay consistent in their business-building efforts.
